'''Kadril''' was an inhospitable, irregularly-shaped [[Planet/Legends|world]] colonized by the [[Reptile/Legends|reptilian]] [[Kadrillian/Legends|Kadrillians]] in [[6 BBY/Legends|6 BBY]]. It was the source of [[kunda stone]]s. It was here that [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] developed [[pacifog]]. The reptilian Kadrillians were the only inhabitants of the planet to survive the planet's bombardment during the [[Stenax Massacres]] of [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]].

{{Planet-stub}}
